name: China Moon Ginger Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pickled ginger juice; from CM Pickled Ginger recipe
recipeInstructions:
Heat the pickled ginger juice, rice vinegar, and sugar in a small non-aluminum saucepan over low heat. Stir until the sugar dissolves. Add the soy sauce and let cool to room temperature.
When serving, garnish the sauce bowls with green onions (thinly sliced) and Fresno chili (thinly sliced). Makes 1 1/2 cups. Store, refrigerated, in a clean glass jar. Shake well before using.
